title: Exposed Wiring Loom
description: Protective sheathing split on main wiring loom beneath driver's console. Multiple bare conductors visible. Fire risk if left unaddressed.

title: Brake Pad Wear — Front Axle
description: Front nearside and offside brake pads worn below 3mm minimum threshold. Brake performance noticeably reduced during inspection test.
notes: Bus withdrawn from service pending pad replacement. Parts on order.

title: Oil Leak — Gearbox Seal
description: Steady oil drip from gearbox rear output seal. Pooling on bay floor beneath Bus VH-1654. Estimated loss of 200ml over 8 hours.
notes: Absorbent matting placed under vehicle. Seal replacement booked for next maintenance window.

title: Passenger Door Actuator Failure
description: Rear passenger door failing to fully open on actuation. Door travels approximately 60% of range before stalling. Obstruction or actuator motor fault suspected.
location: Bay 5, Bus VH-2103, Rear Passenger Door

title: Cracked Windscreen
description: Impact crack on driver's side windscreen originating from lower edge. Crack length approximately 280mm and propagating toward centre. Fails visual obstruction check.
notes: Windscreen replaced by approved glazing contractor. Signed off and returned to service 2024-10-22.

title: AdBlue System Warning
description: Persistent AdBlue system fault code logged on Bus VH-2210. DEF injector pressure reading out of range. Risk of engine derate if unresolved.
location: Bay 6, Bus VH-2210, Exhaust After-treatment System
notes: Diagnostic tool connected. Awaiting readout from OEM remote support team.

title: Depot Roller Door Obstruction Sensor Fault
description: Bay 9 roller door obstruction sensor not triggering door reversal during close cycle. Safety-critical fault — door must not be used until resolved.
notes: Bay 9 cordoned off. Manual operation prohibited.

title: Tyre Pressure Below Threshold — Rear Axle
description: Nearside rear dual tyres on Bus VH-1763 reading 88 PSI against a required 110 PSI. Slow puncture or valve fault suspected.
location: Bay 4, Bus VH-1763, Rear Nearside Axle
notes: Faulty valve core replaced on both rear nearside tyres. Pressures verified at 110 PSI. Returned to service 2024-10-19.
